Cygnal
Polling & Strategy | cygnalinc.com

Methodology: N=800 Likely Voters | Conducted April 14-15, 2026 | IVR + SMS

Voter Profile
              Totals  Men  Women  White  Black  Hispanic  Asian  18-44  45-64  65+  College  Non-College  Rep  Dem  Ind
Sample (pct)   100%   48%   52%    68%    12%     13%      5%    29%    44%   27%    41%       59%        35%  33%  32%

Generic Congressional Ballot
If the election were held today, would you vote for the
Democratic candidate or the Republican candidate in your district?

By Race
              White  Black  Hispanic  Asian
Democrat       36%    79%     51%      44%
Republican     55%    11%     36%      44%
Other/Unsure    9%    10%     13%      12%

By Education
              College  Non-College
Democrat        52%       38%
Republican      37%       51%
Other/Unsure    11%       11%

By Age Group
              18-44  45-64  65+
Democrat       54%    41%   41%
Republican     35%    48%   49%
Other/Unsure   11%    11%   10%

By Gender
              Men  Women
Democrat       41%   50%
Republican     50%   39%
Other/Unsure    9%   11%
